## Meet AIRA - Your AI Twin!

AI Agents remember all your interactions across calls, emails, SMS, and notes and use it to handle admin tasks like updating fields, setting reminders, and scheduling interviews—saving recruiters hours every week, boosting productivity, and driving more revenue.

### Job Change Alerts

Get notified when your contacts change jobs and convert opportunity into business before competitors

* 
 
 Close more deals
 
* 
 
 Improve conversion rates
 

### CRM Update Agent

No more manual data entry. Let the AI Agent update the data for you

* 
 
 Update contact fields automatically
 
* 
 
 Save time and reduce burnout
 

### Research Agent

Get insights about people and companies. Create tailored and unique outreach emails every time

* 
 
 Know what your contacts care about
 
* 
 
 Create ice-breakers
 

### Email & Phone Lookup Agent

Get phone & work email searched, verified, and added in your CRM 

* 
 
 Update contact information in a click
 
* 
 
 Choose between personal or professional emails

FAQs

## Frequently Asked Questions

### Is Recruiterflow’s recruiting CRM software separate from the Applicant tracking software?

Yes and no. In a lot of cases, both these terms are used interchangeably. However, when we say CRM, we mean the client side of your recruiting business. When we say ATS, we generally mean the recruiting side.

### Who owns the data in my recruiting CRM?

This one’s easy. YOU OWN YOUR DATA. When you use Recruiterflow, you give us a non-exclusive license to help you manage your data. It’s entirely yours and we don’t share your data with anyone else. You can also export your data via the API whenever you want.

### Can I control the access level of different users?

Yes you can. Our advanced access control gives you granular control over different fields and create custom roles for custom access control.

### Can I hide contact information on the client portal?

Yes, you can. You have absolute control over what information is shown and not shown in the client portal.

### Can I create subsidiaries of a parent company and track them separately?

Yes you can. You can create parent subsidiary structure and track them separately while the data from the subsidiary gets aggregated and stays searchable on parent profile.

### Can I customise my deal pipeline stages?

Of course you can! You can create custom deal pipeline stages and give each stage a probability to close to track your revenue as well as deal pipeline.

### Can someone exist both as a candidate and the client?

Yes they can and all the communications reflect on both the candidate as well as the client profile.
